findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 39. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The header/footer contact information block (State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management, 1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, 27699-1646, 919 707 8200) appears both at the top of the HTML body (in a meta-description style) and again mid-content after the table of contents, duplicating what was a single page footer in the PDF.
findings.evidence: The footer text 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management / 1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, 27699-1646 / 919 707 8200' appears once at the very top of the HTML and again after the TOC nav element.

findings.description: An embedded image tag with an empty alt attribute appears between the History/Background section heading and the content, representing a decorative/separator image. This corresponds to an apparent page break or separator in the PDF but appears mid-content in the HTML.
findings.evidence: HTML contains '' inserted between the footer block and the section II heading, which appears to be a page-level artifact.
